name: Sauteed Soft-Shelled Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crabs by removing the eyes, dead-man (spongy grey gills), and sand sack.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons of butter and oil in a heavy skillet until hot and sizzling.
3. Add the crabs to the skillet. Cook on each side for a few minutes.
4. Remove the crabs to a warm plate.
5. In a separate step, brown the pecans using 1-2 tablespoons of butter.
6. Pour the cooked pecans over the crabs and serve.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
